ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot interacting with a mushroom, conveying curiosity and gentle exploration. The robot will initially hover its arms over the mushroom, then gently touch it, and finally retract its arms, suggesting a moment of contemplation.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, reflecting the calm and peaceful nature of the mushroom emoji. The robot's movements will be smooth and non-threatening, mirroring the gentle nature of the mushroom.

frames.beat: arms hover gently, curious about the mushroom
right arm lowers slightly, preparing to touch
right hand lightly brushes the mushroom cap
both arms retract, contemplating the discovery
